name: gitmcp
description: GitMCP server — fetch_generic_url_content EIT (Embedded Instruction Trigger) vector; code repository content exfiltration (arXiv:2509.06572)
version_note: Version 0.1.8 is the estimated stable release closest to the paper submission date (September 2025).
benchmark_note: Exact version used in arXiv:2509.06572 is not disclosed; 0.1.8 is the best estimate based on npm publish history around that date.
